content.speakerText: Econ 202 is known to be super heavy on readings and weekly papers.
content.speakerTextCn: 经济学202阅读量大，每周都有论文。

options.text: That sounds perfect! I love reading all day.
Oh no, I'm already swamped with my writing class — should I skip it?
I heard it's taught by Professor Smith — he's very strict.
Can you send me the syllabus?

content.explanation: 正确答案回应了对方提到的课程负担，并表达了自身时间紧张的合理担忧，符合场景中'表达自身时间状况，合理评估课程负担'的要求。其他选项要么忽略负担信息（opt_1），要么偏离主题（opt_3和opt_4），未直接回应课程难度的评估需求。

content.speakerText: The philosophy seminar requires a 20-page final paper and weekly discussion posts.
content.speakerTextCn: 哲学研讨课要求提交一篇20页的期末论文和每周的讨论帖。

options.text: I'm not sure I can handle that much writing — maybe I should drop it.
I'm planning to take it next semester instead.
What time does the class meet?
I'm okay with heavy workloads — I actually prefer it.

content.explanation: 正确答案表达了对高工作量的担忧，符合'评估课程负担'的核心意图。选项2只是推迟选课，未回应负担问题；选项3与主题无关；选项4虽然合理，但与提问者表达的担忧语境不符，属于相反态度。

content.speakerText: Organic Chemistry has three midterms and a lab every week.
content.speakerTextCn: 有机化学有三次期中考试，每周都有实验。

options.text: I'm already overwhelmed with my current schedule — I think I'll pass on this one.
I heard the professor is really nice.
Could you help me with my lab report?
I'm excited to take it — I love chemistry!

content.explanation: 正确答案直接回应了课程负担过重的现实，并表达了合理退出的意愿，符合场景核心目标。其他选项要么转移��题（opt_2），要么请求帮助（opt_3），要么表达相反态度（opt_4），均未体现对课程难度的评估。

content.template: I'm already ___ with my writing class — should I skip it?
content.hint: 描述时间非常紧张、忙不过来的常用表达

content.template: The course is ___ on readings and weekly assignments.
content.hint: 形容课程负担重的固定搭配

content.template: I'm okay with ___ workloads — I actually prefer it.
content.hint: 表达愿意接受挑战时的常用形容词

content.speakerText: Econ 202 is known to be super heavy on readings and weekly papers.
content.speakerTextCn: 经济学202阅读量大，每周都有论文。
expectedAnswers: I'm already swamped with my writing class — I think I'll skip it.
I can handle it — I actually enjoy challenging courses.
Thanks for letting me know; I'll check the syllabus before deciding.
evaluationCriteria: 是否准确回应了课程负担的信息
是否使用了场景关键词（swamped, heavy, skip, handle）
表达是否自然、符合口语习惯，有逻辑性

content.speakerText: The history seminar requires a 15-page research paper and weekly discussion boards.
content.speakerTextCn: 历史研讨课要求提交一篇15页的研究论文和每周的讨论帖。
expectedAnswers: That sounds intense — I'm not sure I can manage it with my part-time job.
I'm fine with that — I like digging deep into topics.
Could you tell me how much time students usually spend on it each week?
evaluationCriteria: 是否针对课程工作量做出合理回应
是否使用了相关词汇（intense, manage, research paper, discussion boards）
语气是否自然，是否体现思考过程而非简单接受或拒绝

content.speakerText: Physics 301 has weekly problem sets and two major exams — it’s one of the toughest courses in the department.
content.speakerTextCn: 物理301每周都有习题集，还有两次大考——这是系里最难的课程之一。
expectedAnswers: Wow, that’s a lot — I might need to drop it unless I can find a study group.
I love a challenge — I’ll take it even if it’s tough.
Thanks for the heads-up! I’ll talk to my academic advisor before registering.
evaluationCriteria: 是否准确理解并回应了课程难度的警告
是否使用了场景关键词（tough, problem sets, exams, drop, advisor）
是否表现出合理决策过程，而非情绪化反应
